requirement_topic.en: UN 38.3 Transport Safety Testing and Landlocked Routing — Lithium Battery Imports to Botswana via Durban or Walvis Bay
requirement_topic.zh: UN 38.3运输安全测试及内陆运输路线——经德班或瓦尔维斯湾进口博茨瓦纳的锂电池
requirement_topic.zht: UN 38.3運輸安全測試及內陸運輸路線——經德班或瓦爾維斯灣進口波札那的鋰電池

summary.en: UN 38.3 (Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods — Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3) specifies eight mandatory transport safety tests (T1 Altitude Simulation, T2 Thermal Test, T3 Vibration, T4 Shock, T5 External Short Circuit, T6 Impact/Crush, T7 Overcharge, T8 Forced Discharge) for lithium metal and lithium-ion cells and batteries of all sizes — including cells, modules, and battery packs used in stationary BESS. Since January 1, 2020, a UN 38.3 Test Summary is mandatory documentation that must accompany lithium battery shipments under international transport regulations (IATA DGR, IMDG Code, ADR). Botswana is a landlocked country with no direct sea port. BESS imports from China must transit through neighbouring countries via one or more of the following primary corridors: (a) Durban (South Africa) — sea freight discharged at Durban port, then transported by road or rail approximately 1,600 km to Gaborone via the North-South Corridor and the Trans-Limpopo road link; (b) Walvis Bay (Namibia) — sea freight discharged at Walvis Bay port, then transported approximately 1,400 km eastward by road via the Trans-Kalahari Corridor to Gaborone. Air freight via Sir Seretse Khama International Airport in Gaborone is also used for smaller BESS components; IATA DGR lithium battery provisions apply. Each transit leg — sea, road, and any rail segments — is separately subject to the applicable international dangerous-goods regulations (IMDG Code for sea, ADR equivalents for road transit through South Africa and Namibia). Multi-modal routing increases handling events and documentation scrutiny at multiple border crossings; BESS exporters must ensure dangerous-goods documentation and packaging remain compliant throughout the full supply chain from Chinese port to Botswana site.
summary.zh: UN 38.3（危险货物运输建议书——测试和标准手册第三部分第38.3节）规定了所有尺寸锂金属和锂离子电芯及电池——包括固定式BESS中使用的电芯、模组和电池包——的8项强制运输安全测试（T1高度模拟、T2热测试、T3振动、T4冲击、T5外部短路、T6冲击/挤压、T7过充电、T8强制放电）。自2020年1月1日起，UN 38.3测试摘要是国际运输法规（IATA DGR、IMDG规则、ADR）下锂电池货物必须随附的强制文件。博茨瓦纳是内陆国，没有直接出海口。从中国进口的BESS须经由邻国，通过以下主要走廊中的一条或多条转运：（a）德班（南非）——海运货物在德班港卸货，然后经北南走廊和跨林波波公路大约行驶1,600公里至哈博罗内；（b）瓦尔维斯湾（纳米比亚）——海运货物在瓦尔维斯湾港卸货，然后经跨卡拉哈里走廊向东大约行驶1,400公里至哈博罗内。哈博罗内塞雷茨·卡马爵士国际机场的空运也用于较小型BESS组件；IATA DGR锂电池规定适用。每段运输——海运、公路运输及任何铁路路段——须分别遵守适用的国际危险货物法规（海运适用IMDG规则，经南非和纳米比亚的公路运输适用ADR等效规定）。多式联运增加了搬运事件和在多个口岸的文件审查；BESS出口商须确保危险货物文件和包装在从中国港口到博茨瓦纳工地的整个供应链中始终合规。
summary.zht: UN 38.3（危險貨物運輸建議書——測試和標準手冊第三部分第38.3節）規定了所有尺寸鋰金屬和鋰離子電芯及電池——包括固定式BESS中使用的電芯、模組和電池包——的8項強制運輸安全測試（T1高度模擬、T2熱測試、T3振動、T4衝擊、T5外部短路、T6衝擊/擠壓、T7過充電、T8強制放電）。自2020年1月1日起，UN 38.3測試摘要是國際運輸法規（IATA DGR、IMDG規則、ADR）下鋰電池貨物必須隨附的強制文件。波札那是內陸國，沒有直接出海口。從中國進口的BESS須經由鄰國，通過以下主要走廊中的一條或多條轉運：（a）德班（南非）——海運貨物在德班港卸貨，然後經北南走廊和跨林波波公路大約行駛1,600公里至哈博羅內；（b）瓦爾維斯灣（納米比亞）——海運貨物在瓦爾維斯灣港卸貨，然後經跨卡拉哈里走廊向東大約行駛1,400公里至哈博羅內。哈博羅內塞雷茨·卡馬爵士國際機場的空運也用於較小型BESS組件；IATA DGR鋰電池規定適用。每段運輸——海運、公路運輸及任何鐵路路段——須分別遵守適用的國際危險貨物法規（海運適用IMDG規則，經南非和納米比亞的公路運輸適用ADR等效規定）。多式聯運增加了搬運事件和在多個口岸的文件審查；BESS出口商須確保危險貨物文件和包裝在從中國港口到波札那工地的整個供應鏈中始終合規。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 — Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods, Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 (mandatory transport safety tests T1–T8 for all lithium cells and batteries)
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations (DGR) — applies to all air freight of lithium batteries including BESS cells and modules via Sir Seretse Khama International Airport, Gaborone
IMDG Code — applies to all sea freight of lithium batteries including BESS cells and modules discharged at Durban or Walvis Bay
UN Model Regulations, 7th revised edition (2021) — Test Summary requirement in force since January 1, 2020

ADR-equivalent road dangerous-goods regulations — apply to road transit legs through South Africa (SABS/SANS alignment) and Namibia (German-law heritage road regulations) on North-South Corridor and Trans-Kalahari Corridor

summary.en: Chinese BESS cell and module manufacturers are required to comply with UN 38.3 for export shipments under international transport conventions. Chinese manufacturers typically hold UN 38.3 test reports and test summaries from CNAS-accredited testing laboratories such as UL, SGS, Bureau Veritas, TÜV, or CAICT. The UN 38.3 Test Summary (required since January 1, 2020) must cover the specific cell or battery type being shipped. A Chinese-origin UN 38.3 test summary from an accredited laboratory is acceptable for Botswana-bound shipments — the key gap is ensuring the test summary covers the specific cell model, chemistry, capacity, and configuration of the BESS units being shipped, and that it is maintained current with any cell design changes. The additional complexity for Botswana shipments is the multi-modal routing through third countries: dangerous-goods documentation, UN-specification packaging, and labelling must remain compliant and legible across sea freight, port handling at Durban or Walvis Bay, and the inland road or rail transit leg to the Botswana site.
summary.zh: 中国BESS电芯和模组制造商须依据国际运输公约对出口货物遵守UN 38.3。中国制造商通常持有来自CNAS认可测试实验室（如UL、SGS、Bureau Veritas、TÜV或CAICT）的UN 38.3测试报告和测试摘要。自2020年1月1日起要求的UN 38.3测试摘要须涵盖所运输的特定电芯或电池类型。来自认可实验室的中国产地UN 38.3测试摘要可用于运往博茨瓦纳的货物——主要差距在于确保测试摘要涵盖所运输BESS单元的特定电芯型号、化学体系、容量和配置，且随电芯设计变更保持最新状态。博茨瓦纳货物的额外复杂性在于经第三国的多式联运：危险货物文件、联合国规格包装和标识须在海运、德班或瓦尔维斯湾港口处理以及至博茨瓦纳工地的内陆公路或铁路运输各环节中始终合规且清晰可读。
summary.zht: 中國BESS電芯和模組製造商須依據國際運輸公約對出口貨物遵守UN 38.3。中國製造商通常持有來自CNAS認可測試實驗室（如UL、SGS、Bureau Veritas、TÜV或CAICT）的UN 38.3測試報告和測試摘要。自2020年1月1日起要求的UN 38.3測試摘要須涵蓋所運輸的特定電芯或電池類型。來自認可實驗室的中國產地UN 38.3測試摘要可用於運往波札那的貨物——主要差距在於確保測試摘要涵蓋所運輸BESS單元的特定電芯型號、化學體系、容量和配置，且隨電芯設計變更保持最新狀態。波札那貨物的額外複雜性在於經第三國的多式聯運：危險貨物文件、聯合國規格包裝和標識須在海運、德班或瓦爾維斯灣港口處理以及至波札那工地的內陸公路或鐵路運輸各環節中始終合規且清晰可讀。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 test reports and test summaries from CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories (CAICT, UL China, SGS China, Bureau Veritas China, TÜV Rheinland China) — acceptable for international transport if the test summary covers the specific cell/battery type being shipped

gap.en: The gap is documentation scope, currency, and multi-modal routing compliance — not standard equivalence. UN 38.3 is a universal requirement and Chinese-origin test summaries from accredited laboratories are accepted for Botswana-bound shipments. Botswana's landlocked status and multi-modal routing create specific additional compliance requirements beyond Qatar or South Africa scenarios: (a) verify the UN 38.3 test summary covers the specific cell model (chemistry, capacity, format) being exported — a summary for a different cell model or capacity is not transferable; (b) the test summary must be from a currently accredited laboratory; (c) any cell design change since original UN 38.3 testing triggers a reassessment requirement; (d) module-level and battery-pack-level assemblies may require separate UN 38.3 assessment; (e) engage a dangerous-goods freight forwarder experienced with BESS/lithium battery shipments to Botswana via Durban (North-South Corridor) or Walvis Bay (Trans-Kalahari Corridor) — each routing option has different port DG handling procedures, inland transit documentation requirements, and border-crossing customs procedures (South Africa for Durban route; Namibia for Walvis Bay route); (f) ensure UN-specification packaging (UN 3480, UN 3481, or as applicable) remains intact and labelled throughout the full multi-modal chain; (g) for large BESS modules, verify weight limits and oversized cargo procedures on the inland road leg; (h) confirm whether Botswana Unified Revenue Service (BURS) requires any additional import permit or dangerous-goods import declaration at Botswana border entry points.
gap.zh: 差距在于文件范围、时效性和多式联运合规——而非标准等效性。UN 38.3是普遍要求，来自认可实验室的中国产地测试摘要可用于运往博茨瓦纳的货物。博茨瓦纳内陆国地位和多式联运创造了卡塔尔或南非情形之外的特定额外合规要求：（a）核实UN 38.3测试摘要涵盖所出口的特定电芯型号（化学体系、容量、规格）——针对不同电芯型号或容量的测试摘要不可转用；（b）测试摘要须来自当前仍获认可的实验室；（c）自最初UN 38.3测试以来的任何电芯设计变更均触发重新评估要求；（d）模组和电池包组件可能需要单独进行UN 38.3评估；（e）聘请具有经德班（北南走廊）或瓦尔维斯湾（跨卡拉哈里走廊）向博茨瓦纳运输BESS/锂电池货物经验的危险品货运代理——每条路线有不同的港口危险货物处理程序、内陆运输文件要求和口岸通关程序（德班路线经南非；瓦尔维斯湾路线经纳米比亚）；（f）确保联合国规格包装（UN 3480、UN 3481或适用者）在整个多式联运链中保持完好且标识清晰；（g）对于大型BESS模组，核实内陆公路段的重量限制和超大货物程序；（h）确认博茨瓦纳统一税务局（BURS）是否在博茨瓦纳口岸入境点要求额外的进口许可或危险货物进口申报。
gap.zht: 差距在於文件範圍、時效性和多式聯運合規——而非標準等效性。UN 38.3是普遍要求，來自認可實驗室的中國產地測試摘要可用於運往波札那的貨物。波札那內陸國地位和多式聯運創造了卡達或南非情形之外的特定額外合規要求：（a）核實UN 38.3測試摘要涵蓋所出口的特定電芯型號（化學體系、容量、規格）——針對不同電芯型號或容量的測試摘要不可轉用；（b）測試摘要須來自當前仍獲認可的實驗室；（c）自最初UN 38.3測試以來的任何電芯設計變更均觸發重新評估要求；（d）模組和電池包組件可能需要單獨進行UN 38.3評估；（e）聘請具有經德班（北南走廊）或瓦爾維斯灣（跨卡拉哈里走廊）向波札那運輸BESS/鋰電池貨物經驗的危險品貨運代理——每條路線有不同的港口危險貨物處理程序、內陸運輸文件要求和口岸通關程序（德班路線經南非；瓦爾維斯灣路線經納米比亞）；（f）確保聯合國規格包裝（UN 3480、UN 3481或適用者）在整個多式聯運鏈中保持完好且標識清晰；（g）對於大型BESS模組，核實內陸公路段的重量限制和超大貨物程序；（h）確認波札那統一稅務局（BURS）是否在波札那口岸入境點要求額外的進口許可或危險貨物進口申報。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory under international transport law for all lithium battery imports to Botswana by air, sea, or road — applies universally with no Botswana-specific exemption; landlocked routing via Durban or Walvis Bay creates additional multi-modal compliance obligations
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under international transport conventions for all lithium battery export shipments from China

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE) — Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 transport compliance is universal — a Chinese-origin test summary from an accredited laboratory is accepted for Botswana shipments provided it covers the specific cell model and is current. Botswana's landlocked status introduces multi-modal routing complexity: BESS cargo must transit Durban (South Africa) via the North-South Corridor or Walvis Bay (Namibia) via the Trans-Kalahari Corridor, with separate dangerous-goods compliance obligations at each sea-port handling, border crossing, and inland transit leg. Engage a dangerous-goods freight forwarder experienced with both these routing corridors and familiar with Botswana import procedures (BURS) before committing to a shipping plan. Verify test summary coverage and currency before each shipment. Confirm applicable UN packaging markings and documentation requirements with your freight forwarder for the full multi-modal supply chain.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3运输合规是普遍要求——来自认可实验室的中国产地测试摘要可用于博茨瓦纳货物，前提是涵盖特定电芯型号且保持最新状态。博茨瓦纳内陆国地位带来多式联运复杂性：BESS货物须经北南走廊经德班（南非）或经跨卡拉哈里走廊经瓦尔维斯湾（纳米比亚）转运，在每段海港处理、口岸通关和内陆运输中承担独立的危险货物合规义务。在确定运输计划前，须聘请熟悉上述两条运输走廊并了解博茨瓦纳进口程序（BURS）的危险品货运代理。请在每次出货前核实测试摘要的覆盖范围和时效性。请与货运代理确认整个多式联运供应链的适用UN包装标识和文件要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3運輸合規是普遍要求——來自認可實驗室的中國產地測試摘要可用於波札那貨物，前提是涵蓋特定電芯型號且保持最新狀態。波札那內陸國地位帶來多式聯運複雜性：BESS貨物須經北南走廊經德班（南非）或經跨卡拉哈里走廊經瓦爾維斯灣（納米比亞）轉運，在每段海港處理、口岸通關和內陸運輸中承擔獨立的危險貨物合規義務。在確定運輸計畫前，須聘請熟悉上述兩條運輸走廊並了解波札那進口程序（BURS）的危險品貨運代理。請在每次出貨前核實測試摘要的覆蓋範圍和時效性。請與貨運代理確認整個多式聯運供應鏈的適用UN包裝標識和文件要求。
